MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTs IVAN CASTILLO & RAFAELA MARTINEZ' Motion For Request For Entry Of Judgment is off calendar per the dismissal filed on April 15, 2013. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Appearances:
Appearing by telephone
Lauren B. Gelber, Esq., from The Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen, 415-398-5000, for plaintiff and moving party
Robin Y. Trembath, Esq., from Gilsleider, Trembath & McMahon, 925-674-3784, for defendant and opposing party: Rafaela Martinez and Ivan de Jesus Castillo

Argued. The court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF WESLEY GILTON Notice Of Motion To Vacate the judgment is Granted. Plaintiff has until June 5, 2012 to file a request for a trial de novo. Prevailing party to send a form of order by e-mail. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: LaVena Ward CSR #7077
